hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.dart) fvm dart format --line-length 120 "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.dart) fvm flutter analyze "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
